changeSet.author: druchek

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM user_role ur JOIN role r ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE r.name = 'moderator' ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END;

rollback.sql: DELETE FROM quiz WHERE title IN ('Relational Fundamentals', 'SQL/Schema Design', ''Final Assessment') AND author_id IN ( SELECT ur.user_id FROM user_role ur JOIN role r ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE r.name = 'moderator' );
